/usr/bin/c++  -arch x86_64 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/WindowManager.dir/App/main.mm.o CMakeFiles/WindowManager.dir/App/AppDelegate.mm.o CMakeFiles/WindowManager.dir/Platform/WindowController.mm.o CMakeFiles/WindowManager.dir/Input/Hotkeys.mm.o -o WindowManager.app/Contents/MacOS/WindowManager  -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Carbon
